_comment: Linear falloff along +Z with Custom shape, in=out=0. Custom is a cubic Bezier from (0,1) to (1,0) with control y-coords (2-out)/3 and (1+in)/3 — at in=out=0 both controls sit on the linear baseline so the curve degenerates to y=1-t. Formula verified bit-for-bit against MODO 9 by probing the (in,out) ∈ {0,1}² grid (see commit history).
